blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
